productDisplayName: Clarks Men Tan Wild Time Sandals
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these sandals from clarks are made for you. These fisherman style sandals are a great mix of classic styling and crafted from comfortable materials. Team them with jeans or chinos and t-shirts for a cool look. Upper Leather upper for durability and comfort with cutout detail on the toe box Frog style closure at the ankle Curved footbed for all day comfort Outsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe for abrasion free comfort Outsole TPU outsole with textured grooves Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
